allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& '.specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1' -Json -ShortName 'mapping-plan' 'Mapping plan between source and destination connectors with field-by-field mapping rules transformation validation and contractual output documents'")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "& '.specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1' -Json -ShortName 'mapping-plan' -FeatureDescription 'Mapping plan between source and destination connectors with field mapping transformation and validation rules'")

Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -File .specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1 -Json -ShortName "salesforce-connector" "Salesforce source connector - connect to Salesforce, read schema \(objects, fields, types\), read records for migration")
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" npx prisma migrate dev --name reset)
